query:
-- Check what eFax services exist and their current costs
SELECT externalId, planName, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, supplierName, customerName
FROM services
WHERE LOWER(planName) LIKE '%fax%'
ORDER BY supplierName, monthlyCost;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Check what eFax services exist and their current costs
SELECT externalId, planName, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, supplierName, customerName
FROM services
WHERE LOWER(planName) LIKE '%fax%'
ORDER BY supplierName, monthlyCost;
